name: sqlbroker-marketplace
description: Plugins for managing local MSSQL access from Claude Code

plugins.name: sqlbroker
plugins.description: Alias-based MSSQL broker for Claude Code, cross-platform (Windows / macOS / Linux). Passwords encrypted with a per-install master.key (AES-128-CBC + HMAC) — works in any run-context (SYSTEM / root / user) so service-as-daemon can read them. The chat never sees passwords. Service installers: Task Scheduler / launchd / systemd (no NSSM). Includes /sqlbroker:install, /sqlbroker:add, /sqlbroker:list, /sqlbroker:test, /sqlbroker:remove, /sqlbroker:status, plus an auto-activating skill on any DB-query intent.
